allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id })
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id, @{Name='Port';Expression={3000}} })
